discountPercent.title: Discount Percent
discountPercent.description: Use the discountPercent from the recommendation strategy — never invent it.

email.title: Email
email.description: Optional. Use the shopper's email only when they are signed in or voluntarily provided it for shopping/profile use. Leave blank for an anonymous single-use coupon.

firstName.title: First Name
firstName.description: The shopper's first name, for a personalized coupon code.
